lyrics.text: I'm the noise you can't ignore
lyrics.author: guitarist

lyrics.text: Your ego's the feedback I feed
lyrics.author: guitarist

lyrics.text: Let's burn this place to the ground
lyrics.author: singer

lyrics.text: I'll be the one to silence your war
lyrics.author: bassist

lyrics.text: Your solos are just screams in the dark
lyrics.author: guitarist

lyrics.text: I'll make your bassline scream back
lyrics.author: bassist

lyrics.text: You're all just a bunch of noise
lyrics.author: singer
